recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: Vampyros Lesbos
recommendations.overview: An erotic horror tale about a vixen vampiress seducing and killing women to appease her insatiable thirst for female blood.

recommendations.title: Compagni di scuola
recommendations.overview: A group of former high school classmates meets for a reunion 15 years after graduation, only to discover that any innocence or friendship is long lost.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A girl is at school. Suddenly it's as if she can't breathe. As she runs down the stairs we follow her into her mind. It takes us deep into dark woods.

recommendations.title: 10 Years
recommendations.overview: A group of friends reunite ten years after their high-school graduation.

recommendations.title: The Swarm
recommendations.overview: A single mother breeds locusts as high-protein foods but has trouble getting them to reproduce until she finds they have a taste for blood.
